title: Live briefing: Humanitarian groups, Arab nations condemn Israel for stopping aid to Gaza
summary_full: Qatar, a key negotiator of the ceasefire, accused Israel of violating the deal. The U.N. relief chief said aid access must be allowed under international law.
summary_public: Qatar, a key negotiator of the ceasefire, accused Israel of violating the deal. The U.N. relief chief said aid access must be allowed under international law.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: condemn Israel for stopping aid to Gaza
